title: S.R. Batliboi is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: S.R. Batliboi is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
S.R. Batliboi is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About S.R. Batliboi:
S.R. Batliboi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.R. Batliboi!
